data.title: Simplicity First
data.technical_spec: Minimalistic UI with primary functions easily accessible.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: User interface maintains consistency across platforms.
data.technical_spec: Consistent menu structures, button layouts, and navigation paths.

data.title: Feedback Mechanism
data.description: Application provides immediate feedback for user actions.
data.technical_spec: Visual cues and haptic feedback for message sent/read notifications.

data.title: Fast and Responsive Design
data.description: Optimized for quick load times and reactive interactions.
data.technical_spec: Uses caching and background processes to enhance responsiveness.

data.title: Accessibility Features
data.description: Supports accessibility features to cater to diverse user needs.
data.technical_spec: Includes screen reader support, voice input, and customizable font sizes.
